

# Blob: Use Cases

## Variations

Blobs can have a default variation and an `accent` variation.

### Accent

```
<lion-blob variation="accent"><button>I'm a blob</button></lion-blob>
```

## Content types

### Links

```
<lion-blob><a href="#">I'm a link</a></lion-blob>
```

### Buttons

```
<lion-blob><button>I'm a button</button></lion-blob>
```

### Regular content

In case of a none interactive blob, which can be used inside a hero section, the chevron will not be shown.

```
<lion-blob>I'm regular text</lion-blob>
```
